summary: Stabilize the app by fixing the Radix Select crash while preserving the existing comic content and ensuring the character Arron appears as intended (Black with a bit of hair).
architectural_notes: Radix UI Select: <Select.Item /> value prop must be a non-empty string; use a sentinel like "none" instead of "" for placeholder/clearable behavior.
known_issues: App can crash on load if any Radix <Select.Item /> has value="" (empty string).
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Adjust Aaron character portrait to depict dark skin and short/visible hair in bold comic/halftone style (character-aaron.dim_768x768.png > character-aaron-v2.dim_768x768.png)

existing_features.title: Eliminate the runtime crash caused by any Radix/Shadcn `<SelectItem />` using an empty-string `value` by auditing all Select components and replacing `value=""` with a non-empty sentinel value, while preserving the user-visible meaning of “Default/None” selections.
Ensure the existing comic content remains present and functional after applying the crash fix, including comic panel rendering and the characters gallery.
Update the character Aaron (user spelled “Arron”) to appear as a Black character with a bit of hair by updating the Aaron character artwork asset and keeping the gallery wired to the updated asset.

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix crash caused by Radix <Select.Item /> using an empty string value prop
Ensure existing comic remains present/unchanged after applying crash fixes
Ensure character 'Arron' appearance: Black with a bit of hair
